events.title: Events & Activities
events.desc: From drinks and bar crawls to hackathons, game nights, CTF challenges and tech talks. Whether you want to network or just grab a beer.

network.title: Build Your Network
network.desc: Meet students from every track: Software Engineering, Cyber Security, Game Dev, Business IT and Technical Computing. Plus alumni and companies.

skills.title: Develop Skills
skills.desc: Win a CTF, build an AI project, pitch your startup idea, or organise an event. Stuff that pops on your CV.

price.title: Less than a tenner
price.desc: Just {price} a year. No hidden costs. Includes access to all events, dev tools and the full SIT community.
